items.name_en: Top-tier original M12109 Grey Neverfull Bandouliere Inside Out BB Handbag. This season's rendition of a classic double-sided design, featuring the iconic Monogram canvas and grained leather on the front and back. The removable zip pouch can be used alone or hung externally. The detachable shoulder strap allows for crossbody wear, while the dazzling metal hardware adds refined details. Dimensions: 24 × 14 × 9 cm

items.name_en: Top-tier Original M13099 Black This Marellini handbag features richly textured Epi leather in a refined silhouette, offering ample space for daily essentials like smartphones. The round coin purse and mirror are crafted from the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami colorful Monogram canvas, secured to the bag body with a rugged metal chain. 19 x 13.5 x 6.5 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: Top-tier Original M13257✨ Supports NXP Chip Dynamic Chip❤️ This Speedy Soft 30 handbag is crafted from soft coated canvas, depicting a full Monogram pattern in vibrant rainbow tones, highlighting the dynamic style of the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami re-edition series. Constructed of calfskin for the Toron handle and detachable shoulder strap, metal corners recall classic luggage elements, while the bow-shaped key pouch and lock add a brand touch.

items.name_en: Top-tier Original M22960 Apple Green. A Buci shoulder bag crafted from the iconic grained Epi leather. This season introduces refined pastel colors, adding a soft and elegant touch to the spring silhouette. The small appearance and matching large resin buckle give the look a stylish and modern charm. Size: 24.5 x 15.5 x 9 cm

items.name_en: Top-tier Original M25072 Elephant Grey. This elegant Side Trunk medium handbag pays homage to the brand's traditional trunks by Creative Director Nicolas Ghesquulere. The body is grained calfskin with smooth calfskin trim, S-ock lock, and metal-effect rounded corners. Handles and adjustable shoulder strap are detachable, allowing for hand, shoulder, or crossbody wear. Dimensions: 21 × 14 × 6 cm

items.name_en: Top-tier Original M47031 Recalls the classic Cite bag design from the 1980s, defining this HangOn bag with a rich retro vibe. Monogram canvas and WN trim shape a modern bowling bag silhouette, while the lock and nameplate add a brand signature. Zipper closure and adjustable shoulder strap offer flexible carrying. Dimensions: 26 × 11.5 × 6.5 cm

items.name_en: Top-tier Original M63801 Wavy Black. As a card case, it is really usable. The design is simple, atmospheric, and stylish, with excellent capacity. It gives a professional and steady impression when presenting your business card! With the development of the digital era, cash and bank cards are carried less, and small wallets are increasingly favored! This wallet is unbeatable as a small wallet; it can hold bank cards and bills without any issues. Compact and space-saving, it is convenient for daily bag use or carrying on your person. A classic style that is popular and timeless, looking good in anyone's hands! Dimensions: 10.8 x 8 x 1cm

items.name_en: Top-tier Original M80695 Leopard Print Screen Print Three-Piece Set MULTI POCHETTE FÉLICIE Three-in-One. The main bag can fit the largest iPhone. It has an inner compartment and three card slots. The small card case can be detached and used alone in other bags or hung anywhere. The adjustable wide shoulder strap allows for shoulder or crossbody carrying. A perfect combination of practicality and style. Size: 17x9.6x3.5cm

items.name_en: Top-tier Original N82068 Grape Purple with Python. This Capucines mini handbag features a refined structure crafted from full-grain Taurillon leather. It is equipped with a top handle, double-flap, and a glossy python-embossed logo, making it a stunning choice for day or night. A detachable wide shoulder strap allows for shoulder or crossbody wear to show off a modern look. Size: 21 * 14 * 8 cm

Size: 27 * 18 * 9 cm
